title: 1. First Run
description: The recommended first walkthrough: verify the installed runtime, choose safe starting settings, and start Neural Companion without optional avatar complexity.

steps.title: Welcome to Neural Companion
steps.body: This walkthrough gets the core app into a safe first-run state. The workspace panels stay docked as tabs while the tutorial switches between them. Use Read steps aloud or Read Step in this tutorial panel if you want the written instructions spoken while you work.

steps.title: Start Without an Avatar
steps.body: Choose None as the Avatar Engine for the first test. That keeps startup light while you confirm that the main runtime, LM Studio connection, and TTS path are healthy.

steps.title: Pick the Chat Model
steps.body: Make sure LM Studio is open, has a model loaded, and that the model appears here. If the list is empty, refresh models after LM Studio is ready.

steps.title: Use Stream Mode for the Normal Experience
steps.body: Stream Mode lets replies begin speaking before the full answer is complete. Leave it On for the normal companion feel, but avoid changing it during an active reply.

steps.title: Confirm Text to Speech
steps.body: Chatterbox is the default public TTS backend. Click a TTS backend tab to view its settings, and click the circle inside a tab to make that backend active. PocketTTS can be selected later after its isolated runtime and Hugging Face access are ready.

steps.title: Load the Tutorial Persona
steps.body: Load the bundled Tutorial_Persona preset. It gives the assistant a helpful first-run prompt and keeps this walkthrough predictable.

steps.title: Initialize the System
steps.body: Click INITIALIZE SYSTEM after LM Studio is ready. Watch the console if something fails; startup messages usually say whether the model, TTS backend, or runtime path needs attention.

steps.title: Send a Simple Message
steps.body: When startup is complete, type a short message and confirm that NC answers and speaks. Once that works, the core installation is alive.

steps.title: Next Tutorials
steps.body: After this, run the remaining tutorials in order. They cover runtime setup, chat, speech, personas, avatars, Visual Reply, sensory sources, AI Presence, Companion Orb, Spotify Sense, Main Chat Remote, Audio Story Mode, Multi Persona Roleplay, and troubleshooting.
